name: HR_GEN_AI_TOOLS_B_
description: This table stores the Gen AI Tools

columns.Name: TOOL_ID
columns.Comments: The Unique Identifier of the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: TOOL_CODE
columns.Comments: Code of the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: SUB_TYPE
columns.Comments: Sub Type of the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: FAMILY
columns.Comments: Product family of the Gen AI Agent in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: PRODUCT
columns.Comments: Product area of the Gen AI Agent in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: TOOL_CREATED_DATE
columns.Comments: Created Date of the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the owner who created the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: OWNER_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the owner who created the Gen AI Tool

columns.Name: NAMESPACE
columns.Comments: Namespace of the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: VERSION
columns.Comments: Version of the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow

columns.Name: HIDDEN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Hidden flag of the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow. Y or N

columns.Name: USER_INPUT_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This column determines whether user input is reauired to use this Tool.

columns.Name: SPECIFICATION
columns.Comments: Specification that can provide additional information for the use of the Tool.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_NAME
columns.Comments: This column represents the system name of the Tool.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This column represents the system description of the Tool.

columns.Name: SEEDED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Seeded flag of the Gen AI Tool in the Agentic Workflow. Y or N

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
